<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Exceptions; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\ProvidesSolution; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\Solution; class ViewExceptionWithSolution extends ViewException implements ProvidesSolution { protected Solution $solution; public function setSolution(Solution $solution): void { $this->solution = $solution; } public function getSolution(): Solution { return $this->solution; } }
